india_trends.title: IndusInd Bank eyes FY27 growth reset after crisis-hit year as profit returns in March quarter
india_trends.summary: IndusInd Bank expects loan and deposit growth to align with the industry in FY27 after a year of stress in derivatives and microfinance, though war-related uncertainty keeps the near-term outlook cautious.

india_trends.title: Pulse of the Street: Markets snap two-week winning streak, tumble on Iran, IT
india_trends.summary: A sharp selloff snapped the market’s two-week rally, with IT weakness and geopolitical tensions dragging indices lower this week. With crude high and the rupee weak, investors rotated into defensives even as foreign outflows stayed selective.

india_trends.title: Reliance profit dips 13% as war-hit O2C drags, retail and Jio steady
india_trends.summary: India’s most valuable company reported a consolidated profit of ₹16,971 crore, marginally above the consensus estimate of ₹16,944 crore of six analysts polled by Bloomberg. Consolidated revenue grew 13% year-on-year (y-o-y) to ₹2.99 trillion.

india_trends.title: Infra projects see cost overrun of Rs 5.61 lakh crore in March
india_trends.summary: As of March 2026, the landscape of central sector infrastructure is marked by significant challenges, with projects exceeding Rs 150 crore collectively suffering a cost overrun of Rs 5.61 lakh crore. india_trends.title: Haryana policy change drives developer interest in senior living
india_trends.summary: Haryana's new retirement housing policy is boosting senior living projects. Developers can now build more units, making projects more viable. india_trends.title: Trade competitiveness will depend on how industry leverages facilitation measures: CII
india_trends.summary: Speaking at a webinar here , Chairman of CII Western region Subcommittee on International Trade & Investment and MD, Continental Carriers, Vaibhav Vohra, also said that the wider adoption of such initiatives can significantly improve efficiency and reduce transaction costs.

india_trends.title: Sebi proposes overhaul of broker capital rules, links net worth to clients and risk
india_trends.summary: The regulator has proposed tying variable net worth to active client base and credit balances, tightening capital buffers for stock brokers to better capture operational risk.

india_trends.title: Intel stock surges 24% as AI-driven CPU demand fuels turnaround
india_trends.summary: Intel’s shares surged over 24% after strong AI-driven demand for its CPUs led to better-than-expected results, even prompting sales of previously written-off chips. The rally lifted its market value past $416 billion and boosted peers like AMD and Arm, as optimism grows around CPUs regaining importa

india_trends.title: Crude shock, higher premiums hit Reliance O2C margins as Iran war disrupts supply chains
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries' Oil-to-Chemicals segment faced margin pressures in the March quarter due to rising crude premiums, elevated freight, and insurance costs. india_trends.title: Government announces Rs 5K cr incentive for states to expedite mining blocks' auction, operationalisation
india_trends.summary: In an effort to boost the mining sector, the government is allocating a substantial Rs 5,000 crore to states that enhance the efficiency of mining block auctions and operations for the fiscal year 2026-27. india_trends.title: Jio Platforms Q4 profit rises 13% as subscriber additions, data usage drive growth
india_trends.summary: Subscriber additions, rising data usage and broadband traction power Jio’s Q4 performance, even as higher finance costs cap profit growth ahead of its planned 2026 IPO.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: COMEX gold down $52/oz, silver slips $1.60/oz on geopolitical uncertainty
india_trends.summary: Precious metals traded lower on 23 April, with gold futures down $52 to $4,672 and silver futures falling $1.60 to $74.23. Market optimism waned as tensions in the Strait of Hormuz persisted, raising inflation concerns and affecting investor interest in non-yielding assets.

india_trends.title: Reliance Jio's ARPU rises to Rs 214 as subscriber base crosses 52.4 crore in Q4FY26
india_trends.summary: Reliance Jio reported a rise in ARPU to ₹214 in Q4 FY26, with its subscriber base exceeding 524 million. india_trends.title: Mukesh Ambani signals steady progress on Jio Platforms IPO — Here's what he said
india_trends.summary: In today's earnings statement for Reliance Industries, Ambani signalled steady progress in the telecom arm's listing, as he said that the company was advancing steadily towards the listing of Jio Platforms.

india_trends.title: Reliance Retail Q4 Results: Cons PAT rises marginally YoY to Rs 3,563 crore; revenue up 11%
india_trends.summary: Reliance Retail Q4 Results: Reliance Retail Ventures reported a steady Q4FY26, with net profit inching up 0.5% YoY to Rs 3,563 crore and revenue rising 11% to Rs 87,344 crore.
